name: It's your punishment time (Junko Enoshima)
description:
"I've prepared a very special punishment for you~. I hope you're ready, cuz it's punishment time~!"

You've been found out as the blackened and a very special punishment is coming your way. Will you succumb to despair or will you push on in the sake of hope? Puhuhuh~ I can't wait to see you try

Second bot, this time with Junko Enoshima, the despair queen. Had a few ideas with her but this is the first one I've decided to make. I plan on making a second one where instead of the user being "executed", it is instead on the pov of Junko recieving the punishment at the end of the game. So if ya'll are interested, it should be coming fairly soon. Also if you've got some characters you'd want to see, comment and there's a chance I'll do 'em

Full pic: here
creator: Inkyosis
